_meta.description: Grok 영상 v2 프로파일 - 3 segments × 10s, 컷 전환, Grok 네이티브 한국어 음성. v2.4 가이드 기반.
_meta.usage: reels_v2_helper.load_v2_profile()이 이 파일을 로드해서 generate_reels_v2_package()에 프로파일을 제공. 분야 추가 시 profiles 키 아래에 새 항목 추가.
design_principles: P1. 3 segments × 10s, hard-cut between segments (Vrew 편집)
P2. Grok 네이티브 한국어 음성 (Seg 1·2 보이스오버, Seg 3 인물 립싱크)
P3. 각 세그먼트 독립 생성 (Grok Extend 사용 안 함, Vrew에서 이어붙임)
P4. 각 세그먼트별 이미지 레퍼런스 활용 (장비·공간 재현)
P5. 명시적 배제(NOT/NO) 패턴으로 시각적 통제력 강화
P6. 훅 팩트는 field_research.json의 market_data·jeju_data에서 추출
P7. CTA 인물은 프레젠터 포즈 + 시작 즉시 발화 + 휴지 최소화

드론배송.training_context_label: 제주 오름 등반로 정비용 건축자재(야자매트) 산악 드론 운반
드론배송.narrator_persona_en: bright, cheerful, energetic young female Korean voiceover in news-anchor style with clear enunciation
드론배송.cta_speaker_persona_en: young Korean trainee (early-20s to early-30s), neat casual clothing with a 제주 lanyard, warm bright trustworthy demeanor

1_hook.image_reference_en: Reference image uploaded: large industrial heavy-lift drone (black body, multiple propellers, heavy-lift frame) with a cargo bundle suspended below by a rope. Match the form factor and rope-sling cargo mechanism shown in the reference image. Reinterpret the scene into a wide aerial view over Jeju oreum (volcanic hill) terrain.
1_hook.scene_location_en:
Wide aerial view over Jeju oreum terrain, South Korea. The landscape shows characteristic Jeju oreum: low, rounded, dome-shaped volcanic mounds (typically 50-200m in height) covered in bright green-and-amber shrubland, gently rolling and clustered together. NOT tall sharp mountains, NOT alpine peaks, NOT dramatic ridges — Jeju oreum are small, soft, dome-like hills.

A large industrial OCTOCOPTER drone with EXACTLY 8 propellers (NOT 6, NOT hexacopter) flies steadily across the frame carrying a cylindrical bundle of rolled coconut coir mat (rolls of natural-brown palm fiber matting tied together) suspended by a rope sling beneath its body.
1_hook.camera_framing_en: Fixed wide aerial establishing shot, positioned high and at a distance. Tripod-stable framing. No zoom, no pan, no tilt. The frame remains locked while the drone moves through it.
1_hook.subjects_wardrobe_en: No human subjects. Single heavy-lift octocopter (8 propellers) with rope-slung cylindrical coconut coir mat bundle.
1_hook.action_movement_en: Octocopter enters from the left edge of the frame at second 1, glides steadily across the frame at constant altitude, and exits at the right edge by second 9. The cargo hangs calmly below, swinging only very slightly. No other motion.
1_hook.lighting_mood_en: Bright natural morning daylight, clear blue sky, soft shadows across the rolling oreum terrain. Uplifting, inspiring, cinematic mood.
1_hook.audio_narration_directive_en: Bright, cheerful, energetic young female Korean voiceover in news-anchor style with clear enunciation. Subtle mountain breeze ambience, distant drone hum, no music. No on-screen text, no captions.
1_hook.narration_kr: 사람 손으론 반나절, 드론은 단 몇 분! 제주 오름 꼭대기까지 건축자재를 실어나르는 배송드론의 시대, 대한민국 최대 드론 특별자유화구역 제주가 앞서 갑니다.
1_hook.cut_rules_en: Single continuous take. No cuts, no angle changes, no scene transitions. Camera locked throughout.
explicit_negations: NOT tall sharp mountains, low rounded oreum mounds

2_demo.image_reference_en:
Reference image uploaded (IMG_7287.jpeg or equivalent actual training site photo). Match these elements directly:
- Large black industrial OCTOCOPTER (exactly 8 propellers, NOT 6) hovering in mid-air with a taut rope extending downward to a vertical wooden tether post on the ground
- A cargo bundle of CYLINDRICAL ROLLED coconut coir mats (rolls of natural-brown palm fiber matting tied together — NOT square blocks, NOT bales of hay) suspended on the rope
- Blue pop-up canopy tent at right side as ground control station
- Black van at left edge as support vehicle
- Two Korean trainees (20s-30s) standing on the ground holding large controllers, focused on the drone
- Clear blue sky above, Jeju oreum shrubland slope filling the background
2_demo.transition_note_en: New scene, completely different location and angle from previous segment. Ground-level view at a Jeju oreum drone training site.
2_demo.scene_location_en:
On-site drone training field at the base of a Jeju oreum (volcanic hill). The oreum slope of natural shrubland — bright spring/early-summer green foliage with some amber accents — rises behind the scene. The slope is clean and natural: NO decorative poles, NO fences, NO torii-like structures, NO tall posts on the hillside. Just untouched shrubland.

A large industrial octocopter (8 propellers) hovers 3-5 meters above the ground, tethered by a rope to a vertical wooden post planted in the grass. CYLINDRICAL ROLLED bundles of coconut coir mat are slung on the rope as training cargo. A blue pop-up canopy tent stands on the right as the ground control station, and a black van sits at the left edge.
2_demo.camera_framing_en: Fixed wide observer shot, ground-level looking slightly upward to capture both the hovering drone (sky portion) and the trainees plus canopy (ground portion). Tripod-locked. Drone and blue sky in upper two-thirds, trainees and canopy in lower third. No camera movement.
2_demo.subjects_wardrobe_en: Two Korean trainees (20s-30s, one wearing a neutral jacket and backpack, one in a dark shirt), both holding large professional drone controllers.
2_demo.action_movement_en: Drone hovers steadily above. Trainees operate their controllers with small precise thumb movements, occasionally glancing between controller screens and the drone. Cylindrical cargo bundles sway only very gently. Natural, focused, unhurried atmosphere. No one walks out of frame.
2_demo.lighting_mood_en: Bright natural midday daylight, clear blue sky, soft warm color temperature. Focused, professional, real-world training atmosphere.
2_demo.audio_narration_directive_en: Same bright female Korean voiceover from segment 1 continues, warm encouraging tone. Low ambient outdoor sound (gentle wind, subtle drone hum). No character dialogue. No on-screen text, no captions.
2_demo.narration_kr: 고하중 배송드론 운용부터 자율비행 프로그래밍, 제주 오름 현장 실증까지! 산업현장에 즉시 투입되는 전문인력으로 성장합니다.
2_demo.cut_rules_en: Single continuous take. No cuts, no angle changes, no zoom, no pan. Camera locked throughout.
explicit_negations: NOT square blocks, cylindrical rolled bundles
NO decorative poles, NO fences, NO torii-like structures

3_cta.image_reference_en: (Optional) Reference image uploaded: young Korean trainee in neat casual clothing, warm friendly demeanor.
3_cta.transition_note_en: New scene, completely different from previous segment. NO drone visible in this scene, NO blue canopy tent, NO van. The ground training site is NOT shown.
3_cta.scene_location_en: A cheerful young Korean adult trainee stands in front of a clean, modern Jeju training facility entrance — a contemporary low-rise building with light-colored walls, clean signage area (signage itself not legible), and softly blurred Jeju natural landscape (greenery, distant low oreum) in the background. The location is visibly indoor-adjacent / urban training-center context, NOT an outdoor training pad. NO drone in the sky, NO equipment behind the subject.
3_cta.camera_framing_en: Medium shot (chest to head). Eye-level. Subject facing camera directly, centered in frame. Shallow depth of field so background is soft. Fixed single frame.
3_cta.subjects_wardrobe_en: One Korean trainee (early-20s to early-30s), neat casual clothing with a 제주 lanyard. Warm, bright, trustworthy demeanor.
3_cta.action_movement_en: Subject begins speaking IMMEDIATELY at the start of the segment with no initial silent pause. Faces camera directly throughout, bright confident smile, warm eye contact. Hands remain comfortably clasped in front at waist level in a stable presenter pose, no raised palms, no prolonged hand gestures, no waving. A single brief head nod on the final word for emphasis. No other body movement.
3_cta.lighting_mood_en: Soft natural daylight, warm, even across the face. Inviting, confident mood.
3_cta.audio_narration_directive_en: Character speaks in bright, quick-paced, energetic Korean with a broadcast-announcer tempo — upbeat and snappy. Begin speaking immediately as the segment starts, no initial silence. Deliver the ENTIRE dialogue continuously within 7 seconds, leaving only the final 2-3 seconds for the closing smile and brief head nod. Only a brief natural breath at the comma between sentences — NO long pauses, NO mid-sentence breaks. Clear, accurate lip sync. No music. No on-screen text, no captions. Clean room tone.
3_cta.cut_rules_en: Single continuous take. No camera movement, no cuts within segment.
explicit_negations: NO raised palms, NO prolonged hand gestures
